project-main.notes: Main project asset archive. Copy this file to asset-sources/settings.local.json and fill in the real Drive location. Do not add credentials.

prepared-assets.notes: Archive mirror for asset-sources/prepared. Keep folder structure stable so tracked manifests can reference archiveKey plus relativePath.

generated-concepts.notes: Reference-only archive for raw generated concept sheets. Prefer prepared-assets for adoption when a prepared candidate exists.
